title: seseli austriacum
intro: Seseli austriacum, also known as Austrian pennyroyal or Austriacum pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion, bloating, and flatulence, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Seseli austriacum include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation. Seseli austriacum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
